summary: Record the aggregate suite after adding MCP JSON-RPC metadata and stdio framing: all 168 test files and 1256 tests pass.

decisions.decision: Retain one bounded aggregate run after stdio framing; treat it as regression evidence only because no desktop process is enabled.
decisions.rationale: The framing seam is application-only and must not be confused with AC-11.b/c process or handler acceptance.

testEvidence.criterion: The full local test suite remains green after MCP metadata and framing additions.
testEvidence.test: Run one bounded aggregate test command after focused MCP verification.

red.outcome: RED: an earlier aggregate run exposed a scheduler-sensitive cache timing assertion, corrected before this framing change.

green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 168 passed (168); Tests 1256 passed (1256); Duration 19.54s.

questions: Desktop stdio lifecycle, MCP handlers, permission UI, and AC-11.b/c remain pending.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
